---
title: "Market Based Sustainability Credits for Dietary Shifts"
author: "Amith N, Harrison Vincent, Keertan Reddy"
date: "2026-06-26"
output: word_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# Read dataset
food <- read.csv("..\\Dataset\\Food_Balance.csv")

# Keep only meat items
meat_data <- food %>%
  filter(
    Element == "Food supply quantity (kg/capita/yr)",
    Item %in% c("Bovine Meat",
                "Pigmeat",
                "Poultry Meat",
                "Mutton & Goat Meat",
                "Meat, Other")
  )

# Sum meat consumption for each year
meat_trend <- meat_data %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(Meat_Consumption = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE))

# Plot
ggplot(meat_trend,
       aes(x = Year,
           y = Meat_Consumption)) +

  geom_line(size = 1.3,
            colour = "#D55E00") +

  geom_point(size = 2.5,
             colour = "#D55E00") +

  labs(
    title = "Trend of Meat Consumption in Asia (2010–2025)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Food Supply (kg/capita/year)"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```

```{r}
emission <- read.csv("..\\Dataset\\Emissions_livestock_E_Asia.csv")

# Select total livestock methane emissions
ghg <- emission %>%
  filter(Element == "Livestock total (Emissions CH4)")

# Convert years into rows
ghg_long <- ghg %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Y20"),
    names_to = "Year",
    values_to = "Emission",
    values_transform = list(Emission = as.character) #
  ) %>%
  filter(!grepl("F|N", Year))

# Remove "Y"
ghg_long$Year <- as.numeric(gsub("Y", "", ghg_long$Year))

# Sum emissions across Asia
ghg_summary <- ghg_long %>%
  mutate(Emission = as.numeric(Emission)) %>% #
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(Total_Emission = sum(Emission, na.rm = TRUE))

# Plot
ggplot(ghg_summary,
       aes(Year,
           Total_Emission)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.3,
            colour = "#0072B2") +

  geom_point(size = 2.5,
             colour = "#0072B2") +

  labs(
    title = "Agricultural Greenhouse Gas Emissions (CH₄)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Methane Emissions"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```

```{r}
# -------------------
# Food Balance
# -------------------

food <- read.csv("..\\Dataset\\Food_Balance.csv")

meat <- food %>%
  filter(
    Element == "Food supply quantity (kg/capita/yr)",
    Item %in% c("Bovine Meat",
                "Pigmeat",
                "Poultry Meat",
                "Mutton & Goat Meat",
                "Meat, Other")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Area, Year) %>%
  summarise(Meat = sum(Value), .groups="drop")

# -------------------
# Emissions
# -------------------

emission <- read.csv("..\\Dataset\\Emissions_livestock_E_Asia.csv")

ghg <- emission %>%
  filter(Element == "Livestock total (Emissions CH4)") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Y20"),
    names_to = "Year",
    values_to = "Emission",
    values_transform = list(Emission = as.character) # 1. Allows text and numbers to blend
  ) %>%
  filter(!grepl("F|N", Year)) %>%
  mutate(Emission = as.numeric(Emission))            # 2. Converts your final clean data back to numbers


ghg$Year <- as.numeric(gsub("Y","",ghg$Year))

ghg <- ghg %>%
  group_by(Area, Year) %>%
  summarise(Emission = sum(Emission), .groups="drop")

# -------------------
# Merge
# -------------------

combined <- inner_join(meat,
                       ghg,
                       by = c("Area","Year"))

# -------------------
# Scatter Plot
# -------------------

ggplot(combined,
       aes(Meat,
           Emission)) +

  geom_point(size = 3,
             alpha = 0.7,
             colour = "#009E73") +

  geom_smooth(
      method = "lm",
      se = TRUE,
      colour = "red"
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Meat Consumption and Agricultural Emissions",
    x = "Meat Consumption (kg/capita/year)",
    y = "Livestock CH₄ Emissions"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```
